capabilities.name: Internal mobility matching
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. match_internal_candidates RPC/skill (migration 20260708040000): employee_skills × skills_catalog vs job_postings.required_skills, match_score + matching/missing skills. Stage-3 live: QA Hire matched 0.67 (typescript+postgresql, missing react).

capabilities.name: Interview scheduling/calendar
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. interviews table + schedule_interview RPC/skill (schedule/reschedule/complete/cancel/no_show/list; migration 20260708040000): creates a linked team calendar_events row, interviewer double-booking check, complete writes feedback/rating into candidate_notes. Stage-3 live: phone screen booked, overlapping slot rejected with interviewer_conflict, completed with rating 4.

capabilities.name: Assessment/test integration
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. candidate_assessments table + manage_candidate_assessment RPC/skill (assign/record_result/list/delete; migration 20260708040000). Stage-3 live: coding challenge assigned, result 87/100 passed recorded → [assessment] candidate note.

capabilities.name: Offer letter from template
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. job_offers table + manage_job_offer RPC/skill (generate/send/record_response/get/list; migration 20260708040000): merges {{candidate_name}}/{{job_title}}/{{salary}}/{{start_date}}/{{expires_at}} from employment_contract_templates (built-in fallback body). Stage-3 live: offer generated for Kim Kandidat (52,000 SEK, start 2026-09-01), sent, accepted with hire_application next-step hint.

capabilities.name: Reference/background checks
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. reference_checks table + manage_reference_check RPC/skill (add/record/list/delete; migration 20260708040000); completed checks write a [reference] candidate note. Stage-3 live: referee added, completed with rating 5.

capabilities.name: Time-to-hire/source ROI
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. recruitment_analytics RPC/skill (migration 20260708040000): time-to-hire avg/median, source ROI (applications/hires/hire-rate/avg ai_score per source), stage funnel, interview stats, open positions. Stage-3 live: linkedin source + interview avg_rating 4 reported.
